finding_results.notes: Theo now speaks in explicit accountability sequence framing (sequence prompt, ordered step plan, boundary-forward reentry instruction). Marisol's pressure voice shifts to labor/body-grounded precision (hot press, bleach in throat, forearm pain, rinse-cycle pressure, sulfur/bleach carryover), reducing mirrored imperative-coaching syntax across the two calls.

summary: Resolved dialogue idiolect separation in both call spans: Theo remains procedural and accountability-led, while Marisol carries quieter, embodied work-floor specificity under pressure.
